parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT i.user_id FROM winloss.indicators i WHERE i.detected_at >= now() - INTERVAL '90 days' AND (i.meta->>'status') = 'classified';

SELECT i.id, i.user_id, i.indicator_type, i.company_name, i.company_id, i.reason, i.sentiment_score, i.detected_at FROM winloss.indicators i WHERE i.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND i.detected_at >= now() - INTERVAL '90 days' AND (i.meta->>'status') = 'classified' ORDER BY i.detected_at DESC;

INSERT INTO winloss.patterns (user_id, pattern_type, company_name, company_id, description, frequency, trend, confidence, first_seen, last_seen, indicator_ids) VALUES ('{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.pattern_type }}', '{{ $json.company_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.company_id ? "'" + $json.company_id + "'::uuid" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ $json.description.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.frequency }}, '{{ $json.trend }}', {{ $json.confidence }}, '{{ $json.first_seen }}'::timestamptz, '{{ $json.last_seen }}'::timestamptz, ARRAY[{{ $json.indicator_ids.map(id => "'" + id + "'::uuid").join(',') }}]) ON CONFLICT (user_id, pattern_type, company_name, description) DO UPDATE SET frequency = EXCLUDED.frequency, trend = EXCLUDED.trend, confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence, last_seen = EXCLUDED.last_seen, indicator_ids = EXCLUDED.indicator_ids, updated_at = now();
